title: linear-loom project read output
description: Output contract for `linear-loom project read <slug>`. DESIGN.md § 19: linear-loom is responsible for its own output stability so ev-linear can parse the read verbs reliably across internal refactors.

schema_version.description: Bumps on breaking changes to the output shape. ev-linear pins to a known schema_version and refuses to parse on mismatch.

slug.description: The operator-chosen short name for the loom-project. Matches the per-slug marker file's `slug` field.

title.description: The Linear Project name as resolved at read time. Authoritative source for human-readable identification.

started.description: ISO timestamp when `linear-loom project create` ran. Sourced from the per-slug marker, not Linear (Linear's project createdAt may differ if the Linear Project pre-existed).

status.description: Top-level loom-project status. v1 emits 'active' always; archive flow lands later.
Derived from the Linear Milestone state. Unknown values from Linear pass through as 'unknown' rather than being silently normalized.

target_date.description: Optional Linear Milestone targetDate, when present.
